nodes.label: Open Energy Platform
nodes.summary: Comprehensive energy trading and management platform built with React, TypeScript, and Cloudflare Workers. Aligned to South African statutory frameworks. Deployed at oe.vantax.co.za.

nodes.label: Consolidated Energy Cockpit (CEC)
nodes.summary: The branded product name for the Open Energy Platform SPA — trade power, carbon and RECs, originate IPP projects, run procurement, and settle on one enterprise-grade platform.

nodes.label: Cockpit Module
nodes.summary: Role-aware KPI tiles and action queue per signed-in user.

nodes.label: Trading Module
nodes.summary: Order book and Durable Object matching engine (price-time priority, partial fills, IOC/FOK/market/limit, per-shard depth snapshots, minute-bucketed ticker).

nodes.label: Contracts Module
nodes.summary: Document lifecycle (LOI → term sheet → HOA → legal review → statutory checks → execution → active) with per-party signatories.

nodes.label: Settlement Module
nodes.summary: Idempotent PPA settlement runs with DLQ and retry; invoices, disputes, payments.

nodes.label: Carbon Module
nodes.summary: Projects, trades, retirements, options, fund NAV.

nodes.label: IPP Projects Module
nodes.summary: Disbursements, milestones, generation performance.

nodes.label: ESG Module
nodes.summary: Reports, decarbonisation pathways, TCFD/CDP/GRI/JSE-SRL/King IV narrative templates.

nodes.label: Grid Module
nodes.summary: Connections, constraints, wheeling, metering, imbalance settlement.

nodes.label: Marketplace Module
nodes.summary: Marketplace for energy deals.

nodes.label: Deal Rooms Module
nodes.summary: Deal rooms for structured negotiations.

nodes.label: Funds Module
nodes.summary: Funds management module.

nodes.label: Pipeline Module
nodes.summary: Project pipeline management module.

nodes.label: Procurement Module
nodes.summary: Procurement management module.

nodes.label: POPIA Module
nodes.summary: s.11(3) objection, s.24 correction, s.22 breach register, DSAR, PII access log, consent ledger.

nodes.label: Regulator Suite (/regulator-suite)
nodes.summary: Licences, conditions, lifecycle, tariff submissions with hearing/determination, PAIA gazette, enforcement (findings/appeals), market surveillance (wash-trade/layering/spoofing/concentration/circular/price-manipulation detectors).

nodes.label: Grid Operator Workbench (/grid-operator)
nodes.summary: Dispatch schedules, dispatch instructions (curtail/redispatch/ramp/black-start) with ack + compliance flows, curtailment notices, ancillary-service tenders with merit-order pay-as-cleared auctions, outages, connection applications, nodal zones, monthly loss factors.

nodes.label: Trader Workbench (/trader-risk)
nodes.summary: Positions rebuilt from fills, manual + VWAP mark prices, pre-trade credit check, collateral accounts, margin-call cycle, multi-lateral netting clearing runs.

nodes.label: Lender Suite (/lender-suite)
nodes.summary: Covenant definitions + pass/warn/breach evaluator, waivers, Independent Engineer certification workflow, cash-flow waterfall execution, DSRA/MRA/O&M reserve accounts, stress scenarios.

nodes.label: IPP Developer Workbench (/ipp-lifecycle)
nodes.summary: EPC contracts + variations + capped LDs, environmental authorisations, land + servitude register, insurance register + claims, community engagement log, ED/SED spend (REIPPPP reporting).

nodes.label: Offtaker Suite (/offtaker-suite)
nodes.summary: Multi-site groupings, tariff registry + TOU comparison, half-hour consumption profiles, budget-vs-actual, REC issuance/transfer/retirement, Scope 2 disclosures (GHG Protocol 2015).

nodes.label: Carbon Fund (/carbon-registry)
nodes.summary: Registry sync (Verra, Gold Standard, CDM, SA-REDD), credit vintages with serial-range tracking, MRV workflow with ISO 14065 verifier opinions, Carbon Tax Act s.13 offset claims with industry-group cap.

nodes.label: Platform Admin (/admin-platform)
nodes.summary: Tenants (suspend/reactivate), self-serve provisioning, plans + subscriptions, monthly platform invoice cycle, feature flags, data-tier snapshot + archive tools, tenant quotas.

nodes.label: Admin Role
nodes.summary: Platform administrator — sees everything, manages tenants, feature flags, subscriptions.

nodes.label: Regulator Role
nodes.summary: Regulatory authority user — licences, tariff, enforcement, market surveillance.

nodes.label: Grid Operator Role
nodes.summary: System operator — dispatch, ancillary services, curtailment, connections.

nodes.label: Trader Role
nodes.summary: Energy trader — order placement, positions, margin, risk.

nodes.label: IPP Developer Role
nodes.summary: Independent Power Producer — projects, EPC, compliance, insurance, construction.

nodes.label: Lender Role
nodes.summary: Project finance lender — covenants, drawdowns, waterfalls, stress testing.

nodes.label: Carbon Fund Role
nodes.summary: Carbon fund manager — carbon registry, credits, MRV, retirements.

nodes.label: Offtaker Role
nodes.summary: Energy buyer — PPA management, REC lifecycle, Scope 2 disclosures, consumption profiles.

nodes.label: Support Role
nodes.summary: Platform support staff.

nodes.label: Durable Objects (OrderBook)
nodes.summary: OrderBook Durable Object per shard (energy_type × delivery_day) serialises matching writes.

nodes.label: Cloudflare Cron Triggers
nodes.summary: Seven cron schedules: 15-min surveillance/DO snapshots, hourly VWAP marks, daily rollups/settlement/margin, monthly invoicing.

nodes.label: Cloudflare D1 (SQLite)
nodes.summary: Primary database — SQLite-based, accessed via D1 binding in Cloudflare Workers.

nodes.label: Cloudflare R2 Storage
nodes.summary: Object storage for archival — metering (monthly) and audit logs (daily).

nodes.label: Cascade Events System
nodes.summary: Every major mutation fires typed events that write audit logs, notifications, and webhooks, with DLQ + retry per stage.

nodes.label: Multi-tenancy System
nodes.summary: Explicit tenants + per-participant tenant_id; cross-tenant checks in auth middleware + resource helpers; per-tenant rate limits, feature flags, SSO providers.

nodes.label: React 18
nodes.summary: Frontend framework — React 18 with TypeScript.

nodes.label: TypeScript
nodes.summary: Programming language used throughout — frontend and backend.

nodes.label: Vite
nodes.summary: Frontend build tool.

nodes.label: TailwindCSS
nodes.summary: CSS utility framework used in frontend.

nodes.label: Recharts
nodes.summary: Chart library used in frontend.

nodes.label: Cloudflare Workers
nodes.summary: Serverless backend runtime — handles all API routes and scheduled jobs.

nodes.label: Hono Framework
nodes.summary: Backend web framework used within Cloudflare Workers for routing.

nodes.label: ERA 2006 (Electricity Regulation Act)
nodes.summary: Electricity Regulation Act 4 of 2006 — South African framework governing electricity licensing, tariffs, and market conduct.

nodes.label: NERSA Grid Code
nodes.summary: NERSA Grid Code governing grid connection, dispatch, and technical standards.

nodes.label: POPIA 4/2013
nodes.summary: Protection of Personal Information Act 4 of 2013 — South African data protection law.

nodes.label: Carbon Tax Act 15/2019
nodes.summary: South African Carbon Tax Act governing carbon offset claims and allowances.

nodes.label: REIPPPP
nodes.summary: Renewable Energy Independent Power Producer Procurement Programme — South African IPP procurement framework.

nodes.label: JSE-SRL
nodes.summary: JSE Sustainability Reporting and Listing requirements — ESG disclosure standard.

nodes.label: TCFD
nodes.summary: Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures — ESG narrative template standard.

nodes.label: CDP
nodes.summary: Carbon Disclosure Project — ESG reporting standard.

nodes.label: GRI
nodes.summary: Global Reporting Initiative — ESG narrative standard.

nodes.label: King IV
nodes.summary: King IV Report on Corporate Governance for South Africa — governance standard.

nodes.label: ISO 14065
nodes.summary: ISO standard for GHG verification and validation bodies — used in MRV workflow.

nodes.label: GHG Protocol 2015
nodes.summary: GHG Protocol Corporate Standard — used for Scope 2 disclosures by offtakers.

nodes.label: Verra (VCS)
nodes.summary: Verra Verified Carbon Standard — carbon credit registry synced on the platform.

nodes.label: Gold Standard
nodes.summary: Gold Standard carbon credit registry synced on the platform.

nodes.label: CDM
nodes.summary: Clean Development Mechanism — carbon credit registry synced on the platform.

nodes.label: SA-REDD
nodes.summary: South African REDD+ carbon registry synced on the platform.

nodes.label: Auth API (/api/auth)
nodes.summary: POST /api/auth/register | login | refresh | logout; GET /api/auth/me

nodes.label: Cockpit API (/api/cockpit)
nodes.summary: GET /api/cockpit/stats (role-aware KPIs incl. national-scale metrics); GET /api/cockpit/actions (unified action queue)

nodes.label: Trading API (/api/trading)
nodes.summary: POST /api/trading/orders (supports auto_match); GET /api/trading/orderbook-depth?shard_key; GET /api/trading/prints (minute-bucketed ticker)

nodes.label: Trader Risk API (/api/trader-risk)
nodes.summary: POST /api/trader-risk/credit-limits, /margin-calls/run, /clearing/run

nodes.label: Regulator API (/api/regulator)
nodes.summary: POST /api/regulator/licences + vary/suspend/revoke/reinstate; tariff-submissions/:id/hearing|determine; enforcement-cases/:id/finding|appeal; surveillance/scan; filing/:type/generate (AI compliance narrative)

nodes.label: Grid Operator API (/api/grid-operator)
nodes.summary: POST /api/grid-operator/dispatch/schedules (+ periods, publish); dispatch/instructions/:id/{acknowledge,compliance}; ancillary/tenders/:id/{bids,clear}

nodes.label: Lender API (/api/lender)
nodes.summary: POST /api/lender/covenants/:id/test|waive; ie-certifications/:id/decide; waterfalls/:id/run; stress/run

nodes.label: IPP API (/api/ipp)
nodes.summary: IPP developer API surface — see /api/ipp for full surface.

nodes.label: Offtaker Suite API (/api/offtaker-suite)
nodes.summary: Offtaker API surface — see /api/offtaker-suite for full surface.

nodes.label: Carbon Registry API (/api/carbon-registry)
nodes.summary: Carbon fund API surface — see /api/carbon-registry for full surface.

nodes.label: Admin Platform API (/api/admin-platform)
nodes.summary: Admin API surface — see /api/admin-platform for full surface.

nodes.label: Settlement Auto API (/api/settlement-auto)
nodes.summary: POST /api/settlement-auto/runs (idempotent PPA settlement); /ingest/push (HMAC-authed meter ingest)

nodes.label: Data Tier API (/api/data-tier)
nodes.summary: POST /api/data-tier/metering/{rollup-day,archive-month}

nodes.label: Cron: Market Surveillance + DO Snapshots (*/15 * * * *)
nodes.summary: Every 15 minutes — market-surveillance scan + OrderBook DO depth snapshots.

nodes.label: Cron: VWAP Mark-Price Computation (0 * * * *)
nodes.summary: Hourly — VWAP mark-price computation.

nodes.label: Cron: Daily Metering + ONA Rollups (5 0 * * *)
nodes.summary: Daily at 00:05 — daily metering + ONA rollups.

nodes.label: Cron: PPA Settlement Run (10 0 * * *)
nodes.summary: Daily at 00:10 — previous-day PPA settlement run.

nodes.label: Cron: Usage Snapshot + Margin-Call Cycle (30 0 * * *)
nodes.summary: Daily at 00:30 — daily usage snapshot + margin-call cycle.

nodes.label: Cron: Monthly Platform Invoice Run (0 2 1 * *)
nodes.summary: Monthly at 02:00 on 1st — monthly platform invoice run.

nodes.label: JWT Auth (HS256, 1h TTL)
nodes.summary: HS256 JWT access + refresh rotation, TOTP MFA, session revocation, login-attempt lockout.

nodes.label: PBKDF2-SHA256 Password Hashing
nodes.summary: Workers-native PBKDF2-SHA256 password hashing.

nodes.label: Advisory Locks (D1)
nodes.summary: Advisory locks via D1 to prevent duplicate trade matching.

nodes.label: Rate Limiter (10 / 5 min / IP)
nodes.summary: Sensitive-route rate limiter: 10 requests per 5 minutes per IP on /api/auth/login.

nodes.label: GitHub Actions CI/CD
nodes.summary: On push to main: build frontend → deploy to Cloudflare Pages → deploy API Worker.

nodes.label: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN (GitHub Secret)
nodes.summary: Cloudflare API token with Pages edit permissions — required GitHub repository secret.

nodes.label: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID (GitHub Secret)
nodes.summary: Cloudflare account ID — required GitHub repository secret.

nodes.label: Video Recording Suite
nodes.summary: Phase 3 of 15-minute product film pipeline. Playwright-based, records 1920x1080 30fps webm shots per role spec. Outputs to media/shots/<shot-key>.webm.

nodes.label: Video Script (script-2026-05-25.md)
nodes.summary: Full V/O script and shot map for the 15-minute product film — located at docs/video/script-2026-05-25.md.

nodes.label: TTS Render (edge-tts)
nodes.summary: Phase 4 — renders V/O using en-US-AriaNeural via Microsoft Edge TTS; produces media/voiceover/act-{1..6}.wav.

nodes.label: Master Video Render (render-master.sh)
nodes.summary: Phase 5 — composites per-act + master 15-min MP4 at media/master/cec-product-film-15min.mp4.

nodes.label: shot() Helper Function
nodes.summary: Playwright test helper: shot(page, url, { dwell, waitFor, interact }) — dwell matches V/O beat duration (10-14s default).

nodes.label: scripts/video/run-shots.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script to record all video shots or a single role spec.

nodes.label: k6 Load Test Harness
nodes.summary: Pre-launch load harness for oe.vantax.co.za. Three scenarios calibrated to SA grid trading-hour profile at national rollout.

nodes.label: Load Scenario: Trading Peak
nodes.summary: 100 traders, 10-minute hold at peak load. ~1,000 orders/min. Models NERSA-licensed traders at SAST 07:00-09:00 dispatch window.

nodes.label: Load Scenario: Read-Heavy
nodes.summary: 200 dashboard viewers (regulator + offtaker browsing). ~20,000 GET/min during business hours.

nodes.label: Load Scenario: Settlement Burst
nodes.summary: 50 offtakers paying invoices in a tight 5-min window. ~500 POST/min. Mirrors EOD settlement cron traffic shape.

nodes.label: SLO: http_req_failed < 1%
nodes.summary: National-scale reliability target — failed request rate must stay below 1%.

nodes.label: SLO: Read p95 < 500ms
nodes.summary: Dashboards must feel responsive on 4G — read request 95th percentile under 500ms.

nodes.label: SLO: Order POST p95 < 1,500ms
nodes.summary: Pre-trade risk gating + DO matching + audit hash chain — order POST 95th percentile under 1,500ms.

nodes.label: SLO: Settlement POST p95 < 2,000ms
nodes.summary: Calendar lookup + line items + cascade fan-out — settlement POST 95th percentile under 2,000ms.

nodes.label: SLO: auth_429 count = 0
nodes.summary: Rate limiter must not trip during legitimate load.

nodes.label: NATIONAL_DEPLOYMENT_EVALUATION.md
nodes.summary: Reference document for load scenario calibration against SA national rollout sizing.

nodes.label: Load Scenario: Cockpit Read (200 VUs × 60s ramp)
nodes.summary: Mass login — dashboards, modules, profile, participants. File: scenarios/cockpit-read.js

nodes.label: Load Scenario: Metering Ingest (100 VUs × 5m)
nodes.summary: Continuous 30-min period writes across 50 sites. File: scenarios/metering-ingest.js

nodes.label: Load Scenario: Matching Burst (500 VUs × 2m)
nodes.summary: Order placement burst on the exchange DO. File: scenarios/matching-burst.js

nodes.label: Load Scenario: Imbalance Run
nodes.summary: Grid-op settlement — end-of-day imbalance run over 48 × 30-min periods. File: scenarios/imbalance-run.js

nodes.label: Load Scenario: Full Day (Composite)
nodes.summary: All four scenarios run concurrently — worst-case load test. File: scenarios/full-day.js

nodes.label: SLO: Read p95 < 500ms (load/)
nodes.summary: Read request 95th percentile SLO for internal load harness.

nodes.label: SLO: Settlement p95 < 1500ms (load/)
nodes.summary: Settlement request 95th percentile SLO for internal load harness.

nodes.label: SLO: http_req_failed < 0.5% (load/)
nodes.summary: Failed request rate must stay below 0.5% — stricter than tests/load/ version.

nodes.label: BASE_URL Environment Variable
nodes.summary: Required env var for load tests — target URL (e.g., https://open-energy-platform.reshigan-085.workers.dev or http://localhost:8787).

nodes.label: JWT Environment Variable
nodes.summary: Valid JWT from /api/auth/login with role=admin, used by load test scenarios.

nodes.label: DEMO_PASSWORD Environment Variable
nodes.summary: Demo password (Demo@2024!) for VU login in load test scenarios.

nodes.label: BASE Environment Variable
nodes.summary: Target base URL for tests/load/ scenarios (e.g., https://oe.vantax.co.za).

nodes.label: Production URL (oe.vantax.co.za)
nodes.summary: Primary production deployment target: https://oe.vantax.co.za

nodes.label: Staging Worker URL
nodes.summary: Staging Cloudflare Worker: https://open-energy-platform.reshigan-085.workers.dev
